name: Multiple Support Agreement Election

eligibility.description: The group must provide >50% of support; the claimant must provide >10%; and others providing >10% must sign a waiver (Form 2120).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows one taxpayer in a group that collectively supports an individual to claim that individual as a dependent, even if no single person provides more than 50% of the support.
